creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
<https://man.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=e2guardian&sektion=8&manpath=freebsd-ports#NAME>: 

> NAME
>        e2guardian2 - web content filter

Please, is that correct? 

<https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/blob/5e21792cad51b19d61e5cd3a7bb28b6ebc4ce912/www/e2guardian/pkg-plist#L245> is: 

sbin/e2guardian

- no mention of e2guardian2 (with a traililng '2') in the list.
